About Us

Building quality structures and lasting relationships across Greenville, SC & Anderson, SC since 2008.

Get Estimate

Our Story

CTH Contracting Solutions was founded with a simple mission: provide quality construction services with integrity and professionalism. What started as a small team handling local pole barn projects has grown into a full-service contracting company serving homeowners and businesses across Upstate South Carolina.

For over 15 years, we've built our reputation one project at a time. We believe in doing things right the first time—using quality materials, following best practices, and standing behind our work.

Company Photo
